name: Gate 2 REJECT_AND_LOOP increments iteration count; loop returns to BUILDER; second iteration reaches COMPLETE
description: Drives loop to QUALITY_JUDGE (first pass), fires Gate 2 with REJECT_AND_LOOP response. tryAdvanceForLoopBack increments iteration_count from 0 to 1 and appends a LOOP_BACK audit row (QUALITY_JUDGE → BUILDER). Driver then calls setCurrentState('BUILDER') explicitly (workaround for known Stage 10.3 gap: tryAdvanceForLoopBack does not persist the state change). Second pass drives from BUILDER through QUALITY_JUDGE, Gate 2 auto-approves (APPROVE_SHIP), Gate 3 auto-approves, loop reaches COMPLETE. Verifies: LOOP_BACK audit row present, iteration_count >= 1, final state COMPLETE. Plan §2 closure criterion 3.
